description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build DEB Packages that can be triggered manually with inputs for Ice version and DEB_BUILD_OPTIONS. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to build DEB packages for multiple operating systems, including ubuntu-24.04, ubuntu-24.04-arm64, debian-12, and debian12-arm64, using different Dockerfiles and build profiles. For each OS, check out the repository and call the Build Debian Package action with the provided inputs and matrix parameters.
